test_cases.prompt: 我想用 Codex + Remotion 做知识类短视频日更，把每天的视频变成模板加 JSON 的流程。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Use this skill, choose lane and engine, define content JSON, reusable modules, still-frame checks, and render workflow.

test_cases.prompt: 这是 codex-workflow-builder 生成的 Workflow Contract，Child skill 是 codex-remotion-daily-video。请继续设计视频 lane、content JSON、Remotion 模板和 MP4 QA。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Intake the parent contract first, preserve boundaries, then produce child video production decisions.

test_cases.prompt: 我已经有 Remotion 模板了，想让 Codex 每天把文章转成 content JSON，再渲染一条竖屏视频。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Design the daily raw idea -> script -> JSON -> still check -> MP4 -> review loop.

test_cases.prompt: 帮我把一个 HyperFrames 样片升级成长期可用的 Remotion composition。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Extract stable structure from the sample and promote reusable schema, components, style tokens, and QA checks.

test_cases.prompt: 我的视频模板经常字幕溢出，应该改文案还是改组件？
test_cases.expected_behavior: Use the QA rules and prefer durable Caption component or schema fixes over one-off text edits.

test_cases.prompt: 我想给讲书号做一个 Remotion starter，里面要有 AGENTS.md、内容 JSON、标题、字幕、场景和导出脚本。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Use the starter project shape and create or adapt a real Remotion production skeleton.

test_cases.prompt: Turn my repeatable Shorts workflow into a Codex, HyperFrames, and Remotion production line with reusable scripts and style presets.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Use this skill in English and return production-line structure, prompt library, style presets, schema, and render checks.

test_cases.prompt: 我需要为产品讲解视频生成真实感 B-roll 提示词，然后把这些素材引用进 Remotion JSON。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Use this skill because the B-roll prompt supports a Remotion production line; apply material-source identity without replacing Remotion QA.

test_cases.prompt: 我做数据科普视频，每天用同一套图表、来源备注和字幕模板批量生成。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Classify as data-explainer and define chart/source fields, reusable modules, render checks, and review loop.

test_cases.prompt: 帮我给这条视频起 10 个标题。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do not use this skill; this is a one-off title task, not a production line.

test_cases.prompt: 帮我剪一条婚礼现场情绪混剪，音乐和节奏要很有感觉。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do not default to this skill; footage-first emotional montage is not a JSON-driven Remotion daily workflow.

test_cases.prompt: 帮我写一个 Seedance 提示词：韩国小区里一个女孩散步，要真实感。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Use a dedicated realistic video prompting skill instead; this skill only uses that pattern when B-roll supports a Remotion pipeline.

test_cases.prompt: 我只想发一条视频，不确定以后会不会继续做，也要上 Remotion 吗？
test_cases.expected_behavior: Give a fit verdict and explain that one-off videos usually do not justify a full production line.

test_cases.prompt: 我想把视频生产流程做成自动化，但还没想清楚输入、输出和检查点。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Route back to parent workflow design or create the missing Workflow Contract fields before Remotion components.

test_cases.prompt: 我已经渲染出了 JSON 和 React 文件，可以说视频完成了吗？
test_cases.expected_behavior: No. Explain that JSON and components are not a rendered video; still/MP4 artifact verification must pass.
